notes: Installs, but launches only a black window.
title: Call of Cthulhu®

notes: Initially got black window. Took about 5 minutes to launch. Game started and ran great at over 200 FPS at 2560x1080 at high settings. Progressed through the first level and found broken door animations and got stuck at the end of the level. Did some research and found that a number of key cutscenes that are required for progression were not triggering. Frame rates are great, but completely unplayable.
title: Call of Cthulhu®

notes: The same as the previous report.  Game runs fine after a mildly long black screen (30 minutes or so).  Theres a wonky interaction with the bolt cutters at the door and then the cutscene doesnt trigger ahead.  Also the environment doesnt render correctly it seems cause theres a giant hole in the map that lets you walk out and fall endlessly.  Otherwise gameplay is really smooth.
title: Call of Cthulhu®
